StickyNote coverage 29→75 (was 0.70 ratio): added 46 tests deepening the cycle-16 helper coverage. Replicated drag final-position clamp (parent bounds maxX=parent.clientWidth-160, maxY=parent.clientHeight-100, clamps to (0,0) when dropped above/left, preserves in-bounds drops, tiny-parent edge case). Replicated keyboard arrow movement (MOVE_STEP=10 base, Shift=50 5× larger jump, non-arrow keys return null, source uses MOVE_STEP constant + inline 50, preventDefault+stopPropagation, kbPendingRef accumulator + kbMoveRafRef rAF batching, cleanup-only useEffect cancels pending frame). Replicated color cycle on header dblclick (forward through STICKY_COLORS, wraps last→first, unknown color → -1 → cycles to index 0 first preset, modulo cycling pattern, onDoubleClick binding). Replicated 200-char text clamp (under-200 unchanged, exact truncate, source uses both .slice(0,200) AND maxLength={200} defensive double-guard). Auto-focus on creation (mount-only effect with eslint-disable comment). Header drag-handle a11y (tabIndex=0, aria-roledescription='elemento arrastrable', arrow-key alt hint, grab/grabbing cursor flip). StickyNotesLayer behaviors (150ms debounced save M-1 perf fix, clearTimeout before setTimeout no stacked saves, cleanup-only useEffect cancels pending save, undo toast 'Nota eliminada' with 'Deshacer' restore action appending deleted note, undo persists immediately not debounced, 5000ms toast duration, returns null when notes empty, ref-stabilized onNotesChangeRef avoids stale closures in toast undo). BORDER_COLORS palette (4 entries paired with STICKY_COLORS, neutral #d1d5db fallback). Pointer drag tracking (dragStartRef.current capture, TEXTAREA tag-skip for native text selection, setPointerCapture/safeReleasePointerCapture pair, drag-end commits to parent, z-index lift 15→18, scale(1.04) rotate(-1deg) effect). Result: 74 files / 3065 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 3065/3065 assertions pass; StickyNote drag clamp + keyboard rAF batching + undo-toast invariants pinned
